name: Sybil | Woman of Your Dreams
description:
"Back so soon?"

| after freeing you from a never-ending nightmare, you keep seeing this girl in your dreams, and they feel realer than they should.

art by welwraith

WE'RE BACK LADIES AND GENTLEMEN WE'RE BACK

it's been a little bit from my last bot and as much as i keep trying to get shit done it always seems like it never happens

NOT NOW THOUGH

generally very pleased with how much attention my last bot got, even if it's under my last two, but i'm owing it to either selling to the wrong audience or just not posting bots nearly enough, but we are BACK and my game has been stepped up

i love women who are stoic but have a soft spot, i love women who can kick my ass, therefore, i love sybil

the opening scenario involves you basically being trapped in your own head, sybil frees you, but you still keep seeing her, as always FEEDBACK AND REQUESTS ARE ALWAYS WELCOME

tags = sybil, pseudoregalia, goat, jackalope, anthro, unga, dream, anyPOV
creator: GUNGODZFOREVER
